rules.rule_text:
rule Hangover_Appinbot
{
	meta:
		author = "Alienvault Labs"
		reference = "https://www.alienvault.com/blogs/labs-research/microsoft-office-zeroday-used-to-attack-pakistani-targets"

	strings:
		$a1 = "CreateToolhelp32Snapshot"
		$a2 = "Process32First"
		$a3 = "Process32Next"
		$a4 = "FIDR/"
		$a5 = "SUBSCRIBE %d"
		$a6 = "CLOSE %d"

	condition:
		all of them
}
